strengths: Direct production experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows
Strong distributed-systems expertise demonstrated through high-scale microservices at dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/sec) and event-driven, scalable systems like GISCollective
Proven fintech-adjacent background with pricing optimization for a Direct Mail automation platform at Optilyz, and real-time metadata handling in regulated commercial contexts
concerns: Limited explicit mention of agentic-AI production systems in fintech contexts beyond re:cinq, with no evidence of credit-risk or trading systems
No direct experience with real-time inference systems, ML feature engineering, or regulatory compliance infrastructure for financial systems
Scattered leadership tenure (e.g., Altom Consulting, RIDE Capital) lacks clear evidence of scaling teams to 30+ or developing senior technical-leadership layers
response.justification: Bogdan’s hands-on work with AI-agent frameworks at re:cinq and his proven ability to architect and scale distributed systems (e.g., dunnhumby’s microservices) align closely with the core technical requirements for a modular, event-driven multi-agent framework. While his fintech exposure is not in credit-risk or trading, his pricing optimization at Optilyz and real-time metadata handling in commercial systems demonstrate transferable domain adjacency. His engineering leadership is evidenced by mentorship, tooling contributions, and scalable system design, though the resume lacks explicit examples of scaling to 30+ engineers—this remains a potential gap to probe further.
